Name: DesertLandMoveSwitch
Notes: A button that can be activated using a Ground Pound attack. Once activated, it will activate a switch. This object connects to collision below it.

Obj_arg0.Name: Timer
Obj_arg0.Description: How long the switch will remain activated before it resets again. Default behavior activates the switch indefinitely.

Obj_arg1.Name: Already Activated?
Obj_arg1.Description: If set, the switch will already be activated and the player cannot ground pound the switch.

SW_A.Description: Gets activated when the button is pressed. If Obj_arg0 is set, the switch will be deactivated again after the time runs out.

ClippingGroup.Description: Objects in this group are always clipped together.

DemoCast.Description: Can take part in a cutscene.
